raw_title: Is AI being shoved down your throat at work? Here’s how to fight back.
raw_content:
“There’s a whole range of different examples where unions have been able to really be
on the front foot in setting the terms for how AI gets used — and whether it gets used at all,” Sarah Myers West, co-executive director of the AI Now Institute, told me recently.

The post Is AI being shoved down your throat at work? Here’s how to fight back. appeared first on AI Now Institute.
